rows.label: qev050606_MSG0002
rows.name:
Heh heh, when we fought exactly as you
advised, that thing tucked its tail and ran
away! I'll admit it... you're the real deal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Alright! We'll corner it at the crater
of Mount M'gando and finish it off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0004
rows.name:
We'll exact our vengeance...
for the lives of our father
and mother it stole from us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0005
rows.name:
...[ST:playername ]!! The Queen Hastara appeared
over here! And... And then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0006
rows.name:
My brother, and Zeulbe too... They got
eaten by that thing... They're all dead!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0007
rows.name:
We fought exactly as you advised,
but... It didn't work at all!
Why...? Was something wrong?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_SEL0011
rows.name:
Admit that you might
have made a mistake.

rows.label: qev050606_SEL0021
rows.name:
Insist that there was nothing
wrong with your advice.

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0008
rows.name:
...You're not to blame. I'm the
one to blame for believing you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0009
rows.name:
Damn it... It's so frustrating... Why
did I believe information like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0010
rows.name:
Damn it...! Then what
exactly went wrong?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0011
rows.name:
No matter what we did, it just
kept a calm face and tore my
brothers' Dolls apart...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0013
rows.name:
...It's back! Listen to me! I'm going to
lure it to the crater of Mount M'gando.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0014
rows.name:
Even if I put my life on the
line, getting it there is the
best I can do... So you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050606_MSG0015
rows.name:
Hey...? That thing took everything from
me. Cut it to pieces, crush its head,
and violently slaughter it for me!![ST:wait ]
